blocked_prediction_inputs: native contacts, distance maps, residue-residue proximity, and coordinate-derived topology
native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing
AlphaFold, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold, or other structure models before sealing
post-seal validation annotations before prediction hash
prior score outcomes as prediction evidence
internal runtime artifacts as biological evidence

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Solution NMR Structure of Protein NMA1147 from Neisseria meningitidis. Northeast Structural Genomics Consortium Target MR19. Entity description: conserved hypothetical protein. Organism: Neisseria meningitidis MC58. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: no special high-pressure mark. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: assembly_context ligand_locked_basin oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v74_context_policy.context_derivation: V74 E68 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E68-known words are allowed; candidate E69 words are withheld from prediction text so V74 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
